attempts.reflection: You need to obtain an iron_pickaxe before mining gold_ore. Specifically, after crafting the crafting_table and oak_planks, you should prioritize making an iron_pickaxe by mining iron_ore and crafting it. This will prevent the step limit failure and ensure you can successfully mine gold_ore.

attempts.reflection: You need to craft an oak plank before attempting to mine iron ore. Specifically, you should use the oak log to craft 4 oak planks (Step 3) before trying to mine iron ore (Step 6 onwards). This will ensure you have the necessary materials to proceed without hitting the step limit due to missing prerequisites.
